en:
After launch, the Hubble telescope sent back pictures that looked disappointingly blurred.
Scientists soon discovered that its main mirror had a tiny but serious flaw.
The problem could not be fixed from the ground.
NASA planned a risky repair mission in orbit.
Astronauts replaced key parts during a difficult spacewalk.
Months later, Hubble began sending clear images that changed modern astronomy.
cn:
哈勃望远镜发射后传回的照片却令人失望地模糊不清。
科学家很快发现主镜存在一个细小却严重的误差。
这个问题无法在地面直接修复。
美国航天局因此安排了一次高风险的轨道维修任务。
宇航员在艰难的太空行走中更换了关键部件。
几个月后，哈勃开始传回清晰图像，改变了现代天文学。

en:
A fire destroyed much of an old shop during the night.
When the owner arrived, he saw black walls and soaked shelves.
Neighbors came the next morning and offered help immediately.
He had the wiring checked and the windows repaired by professionals.
Within a few weeks the place looked new again.
The shop reopened with thanks to everyone who had worked together.
cn:
一场夜间火灾烧毁了这家老店的大部分区域。
店主赶到时，只看到焦黑墙面和被水浸透的货架。
第二天一早，邻居们主动赶来帮忙。
他请专业人员检查电线并修复了门窗。
短短几周后，这个地方又焕然一新。
小店重新开业时，他向所有一起出力的人表达了感谢。

en:
A man kept telling jokes on a flight and made many passengers laugh.
He imitated voices and acted like a comedian in the aisle.
He expected his wife to enjoy the show as well.
But she sat in silence and never smiled once.
After landing, she told him calmly that she had felt embarrassed.
He finally realized that his humor was not amusing to her at all.
cn:
一名男子在航班上不断讲笑话，把许多乘客都逗笑了。
他在过道里模仿各种声音，像个喜剧演员。
他原以为妻子也会喜欢这场表演。
但她全程沉默，一次也没有笑。
落地后，她平静地告诉他自己一直很尴尬。
他这才意识到，自己的幽默对她来说一点也不好笑。

en:
For centuries, the Channel separated Britain from the European mainland.
Engineers planned a tunnel to connect the two countries directly.
Teams worked from both coasts under the sea.
They faced water pressure, hard rock, and huge costs.
At last the two tunnel sections met with impressive precision.
Travel by train became faster and more reliable than by ferry.
cn:
几个世纪以来，英吉利海峡一直把英国与欧洲大陆分隔开。
工程师规划了一条隧道，要把两国直接连接起来。
施工队从两岸同时向海底推进。
他们面临海水压力、坚硬岩层和高昂成本。
最终两段隧道以惊人的精度会合。
从此乘火车过海比坐轮渡更快也更稳定。

en:
A giant old jet had to be moved through narrow town roads.
The aircraft was dismantled into huge sections before transport.
Each section was fixed onto a long trailer at night.
Streets were blocked and signs were removed along the route.
People watched the strange convoy crawl through corners.
Someone joked that it looked like a giant crab crossing the town.
cn:
一架巨型旧喷气机必须穿过狭窄的城镇道路转运。
运输前，飞机被拆解成多个巨大部分。
每一部分都在夜里固定到超长拖车上。
沿线街道被临时封闭，路牌也被提前移走。
人们围观这支奇怪车队缓慢通过各个拐角。
有人打趣说它像一只巨大的螃蟹在穿城而行。

en:
An antique dealer bought an old cupboard that seemed ordinary.
When a worker cut one warped board, golden liquid flowed out.
The room filled with a rich smell of honey.
They discovered that bees had once built a nest inside.
The honey had stayed hidden there for many years.
The dealer laughed and said the old cupboard was as sweet as treasure.
cn:
一位古董商买下了一个看起来很普通的旧橱柜。
工匠切开一块变形木板时，金黄色液体流了出来。
房间里很快充满浓浓的蜂蜜香气。
他们发现里面曾被蜜蜂筑过巢。
这些蜂蜜已经在柜中隐藏了很多年。
古董商笑着说，这个旧柜子简直甜得像宝藏。

en:
In geography class, students watched dramatic films of erupting volcanoes.
The teacher explained the difference between active, dormant, and extinct mountains.
Some volcanoes had seemed quiet for years but were still dangerous.
Scientists have installed instruments to monitor gas and ground movement.
In several regions, villages were evacuated before major eruptions.
The lesson reminded everyone to respect nature's power and warning signs.
cn:
地理课上，学生们观看了震撼的火山喷发影像。
老师讲解了活火山、休眠火山和死火山的区别。
有些火山多年平静，却依然可能带来危险。
科学家已经安装设备来监测气体和地面运动。
在一些地区，村庄会在大喷发前被提前撤离。
这节课提醒大家要敬畏自然力量和预警信号。

en:
A persistent salesman kept visiting the same house to sell encyclopedias.
The lady refused him politely on the first visit.
He came back again and again every few days.
He has been ringing the same doorbell for weeks.
At last she opened the door and agreed to listen for a few minutes.
Even her neighbors admired his patience, though they found him exhausting.
cn:
一位执着的推销员反复拜访同一户人家，想卖百科全书。
女主人第一次见他时礼貌地拒绝了。
但他每隔几天就会再来一次。
几周来，他一直在按同一扇门铃。
最后她终于开门，同意听他讲几分钟。
连邻居都佩服他的耐心，虽然大家也觉得他很折磨人。

en:
A man planned to fake his own death for insurance money.
He had moved his valuables before the false story was spread.
His wife and neighbors first believed that he had been murdered.
Police continued the case and found him alive in a distant hotel.
When questioned, he could not explain all the prepared details.
The mystery ended not with murder, but with fraud and shame.
cn:
一名男子为了骗取保险金，策划伪造自己的死亡。
在假消息散开前，他已经转移了贵重财物。
起初妻子和邻居都相信他是被谋杀了。
警方继续调查，最终在外地旅馆找到活着的他。
面对审问，他无法解释那些提前准备好的细节。
这起案件最后不是谋杀，而是诈骗与羞耻。

en:
Before a bullfight, a nervous matador tried to hide his fear.
He stood behind a barrier and practiced with a newspaper.
When the bull charged into the arena, he dropped his red cape.
For a second he used the newspaper to protect himself.
The crowd shouted as the danger came closer.
An assistant distracted the bull just in time and prevented disaster.
cn:
斗牛开始前，紧张的斗牛士努力掩饰自己的恐惧。
他站在围栏后，用一张报纸反复练习动作。
当公牛冲进场地时，他竟把红布掉在地上。
有那么一瞬间，他只好拿报纸挡在身前。
危险逼近时，观众席上传来一阵惊呼。
幸好助手及时引开公牛，避免了事故发生。

en:
A famous clock in London stopped after a violent storm.
Tourists stared at the frozen hands and took photos.
Engineers found that old gears had been badly worn.
For safety, heavy parts were lowered from the tower.
After weeks of work, the mechanism was adjusted and tested.
Then the clock struck again, and the city heard its voice return.
cn:
伦敦一座著名大钟在暴风雨后突然停摆。
游客盯着静止的指针，纷纷拍照。
工程师发现内部老旧齿轮已经严重磨损。
为安全起见，沉重部件被从塔楼上缓缓降下。
经过数周维修，机械装置完成调整与测试。
随后钟声再次响起，全城都听见它归来的声音。

en:
Donald Campbell drove Bluebird across a flat racing track.
Before the attempt, his team had been testing the engine for days.
At the start, the car accelerated smoothly and gained speed rapidly.
Soon it ran faster than the previous world record.
Radio reports spread the news, and spectators cheered loudly.
The victory showed that long preparation had turned courage into history.
cn:
唐纳德·坎贝尔驾驶“蓝鸟”冲上平直赛道。
正式挑战前，他的团队已经连续多天测试发动机。
起跑后，这辆车平稳加速，速度迅速提升。
不久它就超过了先前的世界纪录。
广播传出消息后，观众爆发出欢呼。
这次胜利证明，长期准备把勇气变成了历史。
